## 变更类型 | Change Type

- [ ] ✨ feat: 新功能 (New feature)
- [ ] 🐛 fix: Bug 修复 (Bug fix)
- [ ] 📄 docs: 文档更新 (Documentation)
- [ ] ♻️ refactor: 代码重构 (Refactoring)
- [ ] 🎨 style: 代码格式 (Code style)
- [ ] ⚡ perf: 性能优化 (Performance)
- [ ] ✅ test: 测试相关 (Tests)
- [ ] 🔧 chore: 构建/工具链 (Build/Tooling)

## 概述 | Summary

<!-- 1-3 句话描述本次变更 -->

-

## 变更内容 | Changes

<!-- 具体改了什么，为什么要改 -->

## 破坏性变更 | Breaking Changes

<!-- 如果有破坏性变更，请在此说明影响范围和迁移方法。没有则填 "无" -->

无

## 测试计划 | Test Plan

- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd web && pnpm test:run`)
- [ ] Frontend lint pass (`cd web && pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Backend builds (`cd server && go build ./...`)
- [ ] Backend vet passes (`cd server && go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd server && make test`)
- [ ] Manual testing performed
